subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur beareth witness that there is none other God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and the tongues of all created things testify that He [3.5s]... ...Teach ye your children the verses that have been divinely revealed, that they may recite them in most melodious voices.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد لسان العظمه انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم و تشهد السن الکائنات انه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @education of children; moral education, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
